summary: Frontend testing of Learn Pillar P0/P1 features (iteration 178). All 8 key features from review_request tested and confirmed working for user Mojo (Indie). LearnServiceFlow modal, GuidedLearnPaths, Training dim expansion (Products/Book/Personalised tabs), Book a Session tab, and hero subtitle all verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Mojo shows 'Puppy Programme' chip in hero because pet.age=null → getAge()=0 → isPuppy()=true. Mojo is an adult Indie, not a puppy. Data issue: age_years not set in doggy_soul_answers for Mojo.

ui_bugs.component: Training dim Book tab - services filter
ui_bugs.issue: Training dim Book tab shows ALL learn services (New Pet Parent Onboarding, Breed Education, etc.) not just Training-specific ones. Services don't have category='training' set in DB, so filter falls back to pillar='learn'&&!category = all learn services. Chip prompt 'What does Mojo need from Training?' correctly shows, but service cards aren't training-specific.

issues: Training pill stays highlighted/active state after navigating away from the dim and clicking Book a Session tab (minor visual state bleed)

action_items: Optional: Set age_years in Mojo's doggy_soul_answers to avoid 'Puppy Programme' misclassification
Optional: Add category='training' (or relevant dim IDs) to learn services in DB for better dim-specific filtering in Book tabs
critical_code_review_comments: DimExpanded Book tab: dimServices filter `s.category===dim.id` works but requires service DB entries to have category=dim.id. Currently all learn services have no category, so all services show in every dim's Book tab - minor UX issue.

isPuppy() uses getAge() which returns parseInt(pet?.doggy_soul_answers?.age_years||'0') — age=null becomes 0 which triggers puppy logic. Consider adding null guard: if age===0 and no birthday, treat as unknown not puppy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 P0/P1 features PASS. Hero subtitle ✅, 3 tabs ✅, 6 guided paths with modal ✅, LearnServiceFlow 3-step modal ✅ (Level/Schedule/Confirm + pet badge + progress bar + ✕ close), Training dim Products=26, Book=chip+services, Personalised=breed tip+products ✅, Book a Session watercolour cards ✅. Two minor notes: Mojo shows 'Puppy Programme' (null age→0→isPuppy=true), Training Book tab shows all learn services (no category set in DB). H1=40px matches Care/Play.

test_results_detail.1_hero_subtitle: PASS - 'Training, behaviour, tricks & enrichment — all personalised and arranged by Mira.' visible. H1='Learn & Grow for Mojo' at 40px.
test_results_detail.2_tab_bar: PASS - 3 tabs: Learn & Products, Book a Session, Find Learn all visible and clickable
test_results_detail.3_guided_paths_section: PASS - 'Guided Learning Paths' heading + '6 paths' badge + all 6 'Start for Mojo →' CTAs. All 6 path titles (New Puppy Start, New Rescue & Rehome, Basic Training, Behaviour & Impulse, Mental Enrichment, Senior Dog Care) visible.
test_results_detail.4_guided_path_modal: PASS - Modal opens with step flow (Step 1 of 3), 'For Mojo' pet badge with 'Indie' breed, ✕ close button, step navigation works (Step 1→Step 2→closed)
test_results_detail.5_learn_service_flow_modal: PASS - Opens from Book a Session tab 'Book →'. Shows service name in header, 'Personalised for Indie · arranged by Mira' subtitle, progress bar, Step 1 of 3 indicator, 'For Mojo' pet badge, level options (4 choices), Step 2 schedule picker, Step 3 Mira's on it ✦ confirm with 'Send to Concierge®' button. ✕ close works.
test_results_detail.6_training_dim_products: PASS - Training dim expanded: '✓ 26 safe for Mojo' shown. Sub-category filters: All, Foundations, Care Essentials. Products loaded with images.
test_results_detail.7_training_dim_book_tab: PASS - 'What does Mojo need from Training?' chip prompt + 'Our Concierge® will arrange...' text + service cards with Book → buttons that open LearnServiceFlow modal
test_results_detail.8_training_dim_personalised: PASS - '✦ PERSONALISED FOR MOJO · INDIE' header + Indie breed tip ('Nose work and exploration; calm confident guidance') + 'INDIE PICKS FOR MOJO' products grid
test_results_detail.9_book_session_watercolour_cards: PASS - Watercolour illustrated service cards: New Pet Parent Onboarding (₹1,500), Breed Education Session (₹800), Puppy Transition Guidance (₹2,000), Senior Pet Care Education (₹1,000) + more. Each card has Book → button.
test_results_detail.puppy_programme_note: MINOR - Mojo shows 'Puppy Programme' in hero (age=null→0→isPuppy=true). Not functionally breaking but semantically wrong.
